mapper.sql: c.id AS cart_id, s.id AS sku_id, p.id AS product_id, p.title AS product_name, s.specs AS sku_spec, p.main_image AS product_image, s.price AS price, s.price AS original_price, c.quantity AS quantity, s.stock AS stock, p.merchant_id AS merchant_id, m.merchant_name AS merchant_name, p.status AS product_status, p.audit_status AS product_audit_status, CASE WHEN c.attribution_expires_at > NOW() AND dp.status = 1 AND mdp.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 AND mdp.product_id = p.id THEN c.distributor_product_id END AS distributor_product_id, CASE WHEN c.attribution_expires_at > NOW() AND dp.status = 1 AND mdp.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 AND mdp.product_id = p.id THEN dp.promotion_code END AS promotion_code, CASE WHEN c.attribution_expires_at > NOW() AND dp.status = 1 AND mdp.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 AND mdp.product_id = p.id THEN mdp.commission_rate END AS commission_rate, c.attribution_expires_at AS attribution_expires_at
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, sku_id, quantity, distributor_product_id, attribution_expires_at FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, sku_id, quantity, distributor_product_id, attribution_expires_at FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND sku_id = #{skuId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT FROM cart c JOIN sku s ON c.sku_id = s.id JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON p.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN distributor_product dp ON dp.id = c.distributor_product_id LEFT JOIN merchant_distribution_product mdp ON mdp.id = dp.distribution_product_id LEFT JOIN distributor d ON d.id = dp.distributor_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, sku_id, quantity, distributor_product_id, attribution_expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity}, #{distributorProductId}, #{attributionExpiresAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity}, distributor_product_id = CASE WHEN attribution_expires_at > NOW() THEN distributor_product_id ELSE NULL END, attribution_expires_at = CASE WHEN attribution_expires_at > NOW() THEN attribution_expires_at ELSE NULL END WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
